title: OpenGlobes Aquatic
body:
[aquatic.openglobes.com →](https://aquatic.openglobes.com/) · [GitHub →](https://github.com/forest0xia/openglobes-aquatic)

An interactive 3D globe showcasing 228 marine species swimming in the ocean — not icons on a map, but living creatures animated with custom GLSL shaders. All 1,900+ species instances render in a single draw call using an InstancedMesh with five swim animation types, body wave simulation, and bioluminescent glow effects.

一个互动式 3D 地球，展示 228 种海洋生物在深海中游动——不是地图上的图标，而是活的生命。通过自定义 GLSL 着色器实现五种游泳动画、身体波动模拟和生物荧光效果，所有 1900 多个物种实例用单次绘制调用渲染。

Includes 81 migration corridors, 25 marine hotspots, ocean current overlays, and multiple globe textures (Blue Marble, night lights, terrain, satellite). Species data comes from OBIS, FishBase, and GBIF, with bilingual Chinese-English names and 1,000+ viewing spots.

包含 81 条洄游路线、25 个海洋热点、洋流叠加层和多种地球贴图（蓝色大理石、夜景、地形、高清卫星）。物种数据来自 OBIS、FishBase 和 GBIF，支持中英双语名称和 1000 多个观赏地点。

Built with Vite, React 19, Three.js, and Tailwind 4. Part of the [OpenGlobes](https://openglobes.com) project — open-source 3D data globe visualizations.

基于 Vite、React 19、Three.js 和 Tailwind 4 构建。属于 [OpenGlobes](https://openglobes.com) 项目的一部分——开源 3D 数据地球可视化。
